title: Greenhouse Jobs Scraper
description: Discover, scrape, and search jobs from thousands of companies using Greenhouse as their ATS. Auto-discovers companies — no manual URL input needed.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description:
How to run the scraper:
- 'all' — Auto-discover ALL companies and scrape every job board. Zero config.
- 'companies' — Scrape only the company slugs you specify.
- 'search' — Search a specific company's jobs by keyword (fast, single API call).
mode.sectionDescription: Choose how you want to discover and scrape Greenhouse job boards.

companies.title: Company Slugs (Board Tokens)
companies.description:
Greenhouse board tokens to scrape. Used in 'companies' and 'search' modes.

The token is the path segment in boards.greenhouse.io/{token}. Examples: 'stripe', 'airbnb', 'cloudflare', 'figma'.

Not sure of the token? Run in 'all' mode first — the output includes every slug.
companies.sectionDescription: Specify which companies to scrape. Leave empty for 'all' mode.

locationFilter.title: Location Filter
locationFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match job locations.

Examples:
- 'europe|germany|uk|france' — European jobs
- 'remote' — Any location containing 'remote'
- 'new york|san francisco|austin' — US tech hubs
- 'prague|czech' — Specific city/country

departmentFilter.title: Department Filter
departmentFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match departments.

Examples:
- 'engineering|product' — Tech roles
- 'sales|marketing|growth' — Go-to-market
- 'design|creative' — Design teams
- 'data|machine.learning|ai' — Data/ML roles

officeFilter.title: Office Filter
officeFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match office names.

Examples:
- 'berlin|london|amsterdam' — European offices
- 'remote' — Remote offices
- 'new york|san francisco' — US offices

keywordFilter.title: Title/Keyword Filter
keywordFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match job titles.

Examples:
- 'senior|staff|lead|principal' — Senior roles
- 'full.?stack|fullstack' — Full-stack engineers
- 'react|typescript|node' — Tech-specific
- 'founding|head.of|vp|director' — Leadership
- 'intern|junior|entry' — Entry-level

includeContent.title: Include Full Descriptions
includeContent.description: Include the full HTML job description in output. Increases dataset size significantly (~10x). Default: off to keep results lean.

concurrency.title: Concurrency
concurrency.description: Number of parallel API requests. Higher = faster scraping but more memory. Recommended: 10 for full scrape, 5 for testing.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description:
How to format output records:
- 'unified' (default) — Normalized schema consistent across all ATS platforms with structured location, salary, company objects
- 'raw' — Native Greenhouse format, no normalization
- 'both' — Unified schema with original Greenhouse data in the 'raw' field

maxCompanies.title: Max Companies
maxCompanies.description: Limit the number of companies to scrape. 0 = no limit (scrape all). Useful for testing or staying within budget.
